message:
refactor: Reuse SQL layer types and add complete DataFrame API

Code reuse:
- Reuse AggregateType from sql/aggregate_functions.zig
- Reuse JoinType from sql/ast.zig
- Reuse SetOperationType from sql/ast.zig
- Reuse WindowFrame and FrameBound from sql/ast.zig

New aggregate functions in GroupedFrame:
- stddev(), stddevPop() - standard deviation
- variance(), varPop() - variance
- median() - 50th percentile
- percentile() - arbitrary percentile

New window functions:
- ntile() - divide rows into N buckets
- percentRank() - relative rank as percentage
- cumeDist() - cumulative distribution
- firstValue(), lastValue() - first/last in partition
- nthValue() - nth value in partition

Aggregate window functions:
- sumOver(), avgOver(), minOver(), maxOver(), countOver()

Other additions:
- HAVING clause support via GroupedFrame.having()
- Fixed lag/lead offset parameter (was ignored)
- WindowSpec now supports offset, default_value, n_tiles
